calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Richard Brown.
Default was entered against defendant on September 22, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 30, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Richard Brown as follows:

Defendant Richard Brown is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards or any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
